### REQUEST ###

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/protocols/http1.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"HTTP/1.1 request/response parsing from reassembled plaintext streams.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport re\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\n\r\nHTTP_METHODS = (\"GET\", \"POST\", \"PUT\", \"PATCH\", \"DELETE\", \"HEAD\", \"OPTIONS\", \"CONNECT\", \"TRACE\")\r\nHTTP1_RESPONSE_RE = re.compile(rb\"^HTTP/1\\.[01]\\s+(\\d{3})\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\nREQUEST_LINE_RE = re.compile(rb\"^([A-Z]+)\\s+([^\\s]+)\\s+HTTP/1\\.[01]\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _find_request_starts(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return byte offsets where HTTP requests start (method token).\"\"\"\r\n    starts = []\r\n    i = 0\r\n    while i < len(data):\r\n        for method in HTTP_METHODS:\r\n            m = method.encode()\r\n            if data[i : i + len(m)] == m and (i == 0 or data[i - 1 : i] in b\"\\r\\n\"):\r\n                starts.append(i)\r\n                break\r\n        i += 1\r\n    return starts\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _find_response_starts(data: bytes) -> list[tuple[int, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return list of (offset, status_code) for HTTP response starts.\"\"\"\r\n    results = []\r\n    for m in HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.finditer(data):\r\n        results.append((m.start(), int(m.group(1))))\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _header_value(data: bytes, name: str) -> str | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Get first header value (case-insensitive).\"\"\"\r\n    prefix = name.encode().lower() + b\":\"\r\n    start = data.lower().find(prefix)\r\n    if start == -1:\r\n        return None\r\n    end = data.find(b\"\\r\\n\", start)\r\n    if end == -1:\r\n        end = len(data)\r\n    line = data[start + len(prefix) : end].strip().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    return line\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _split_headers_body(data: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (headers_bytes, body_bytes) after first \\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n.\"\"\"\r\n    idx = data.find(b\"\\r\\n\\r\\n\")\r\n    if idx == -1:\r\n        return (data, b\"\")\r\n    return (data[:idx], data[idx + 4 :])\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _body_length_from_headers(headers: bytes) -> int | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Content-Length if present.\"\"\"\r\n    v = _header_value(headers, \"Content-Length\")\r\n    if v is None:\r\n        return None\r\n    try:\r\n        return int(v)\r\n    except ValueError:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_chunked(body: bytes) -> bytes:\r\n    \"\"\"Best-effort chunked decode; return concatenated body.\"\"\"\r\n    out = bytearray()\r\n    i = 0\r\n    while i < len(body):\r\n        line_end = body.find(b\"\\r\\n\", i)\r\n        if line_end == -1:\r\n            break\r\n        try:\r\n            size = int(body[i:line_end].strip().split(b\";\")[0], 16)\r\n        except ValueError:\r\n            break\r\n        i = line_end + 2\r\n        if size == 0:\r\n            break\r\n        if i + size <= len(body):\r\n            out.extend(body[i : i + size])\r\n        i += size\r\n        if body.find(b\"\\r\\n\", i) == i:\r\n            i += 2\r\n    return bytes(out)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_request(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse one request starting at start. Return (parsed_dict, start, end_offset) or None.\"\"\"\r\n    chunk = data[start:]\r\n    headers, body = _split_headers_body(chunk)\r\n    req_line = headers.split(b\"\\r\\n\")[0]\r\n    match = REQUEST_LINE_RE.match(req_line)\r\n    if not match:\r\n        return None\r\n    method = match.group(1).decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    path = match.group(2).decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    host = _header_value(headers, \"Host\")\r\n    cl = _body_length_from_headers(headers)\r\n    if cl is not None:\r\n        body_len = min(cl, len(body))\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4 + body_len\r\n    else:\r\n        te = _header_value(headers, \"Transfer-Encoding\")\r\n        if te and \"chunked\" in te.lower():\r\n            # consume chunked body best-effort\r\n            raw_body = body\r\n            body = _parse_chunked(raw_body)\r\n            end = start + len(headers) + 4 + len(raw_body)  # approximate\r\n        else:\r\n            end = start + len(headers) + 4\r\n    return ({\"method\": method, \"path\": path, \"host\": host, \"headers\": headers, \"body\": body, \"start\": start, \"end\": end}, start, end)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_response(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse one response. Return (parsed_dict, start, end_offset).\"\"\"\r\n    chunk = data[start:]\r\n    headers, body = _split_headers_body(chunk)\r\n    status_match = HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.match(headers.split(b\"\\r\\n\")[0] + b\" \")\r\n    if not status_match:\r\n        status_match = HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.search(headers)\r\n    if not status_match:\r\n        return None\r\n    status_code = int(status_match.group(1))\r\n    cl = _body_length_from_headers(headers)\r\n    if cl is not None:\r\n        body_len = min(cl, len(body))\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4 + body_len\r\n    else:\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4\r\n    return ({\"status_code\": status_code, \"headers\": headers, \"body\": body, \"start\": start, \"end\": end}, start, end)\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HTTP1Handler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/1.1 request/response pairs from plaintext reassembled streams.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"http1\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if not c2s_bytes and not s2c_bytes:\r\n            return False\r\n        data = c2s_bytes[:200] if c2s_bytes else s2c_bytes[:200]\r\n        if REQUEST_LINE_RE.match(data.lstrip()) or b\"HTTP/1.\" in data[:20]:\r\n            return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        req_starts = _find_request_starts(c2s_bytes)\r\n        resp_starts = _find_response_starts(s2c_bytes)\r\n        if not req_starts:\r\n            return []\r\n        req_idx = 0\r\n        resp_idx = 0\r\n        txn_index = 0\r\n        while req_idx < len(req_starts):\r\n            req_start = req_starts[req_idx]\r\n            result = _consume_request(c2s_bytes, req_start)\r\n            if not result:\r\n                req_idx += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            req_info, _r0, req_end = result\r\n            # Pair with next response (simple: next response start after previous response end)\r\n            resp_start_offset = 0\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                resp_start_offset, status_code = resp_starts[resp_idx]\r\n                resp_result = _consume_response(s2c_bytes, resp_start_offset)\r\n                if resp_result:\r\n                    resp_info, _s0, resp_end = resp_result\r\n                    resp_end_offset = resp_end\r\n                else:\r\n                    resp_end_offset = resp_start_offset\r\n            else:\r\n                status_code = None\r\n                resp_end_offset = 0\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_start, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_start_offset, s2c_ts_map) if resp_idx < len(resp_starts) else None\r\n            end_ts = response_ts  # approximate\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts) and resp_result := _consume_response(s2c_bytes, resp_start_offset):\r\n                _, _, resp_end = resp_result\r\n                end_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_end, s2c_ts_map) or end_ts\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            request_bytes = req_end - req_start\r\n            response_bytes = resp_end_offset - resp_start_offset if resp_idx < len(resp_starts) else 0\r\n            if resp_result and resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                _, _, re = resp_result\r\n                response_bytes = re - resp_start_offset\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id, txn_index)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"http1\",\r\n                    method=req_info.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req_info.get(\"host\"),\r\n                    path=req_info.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=status_code,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=end_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=request_bytes,\r\n                    response_bytes=response_bytes,\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n            txn_index += 1\r\n            req_idx += 1\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                resp_idx += 1\r\n        return transactions\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_response_ret(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Same as _consume_response but return type for resp_result.\"\"\"\r\n    return _consume_response(data, start)\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

ts_at_offset\r\n\r\nHTTP_METHODS = (\"GET\", \"POST\", \"PUT\", \"PATCH\", \"DELETE\", \"HEAD\", \"OPTIONS\", \"CONNECT\", \"TRACE\")\r\nHTTP1_RESPONSE_RE = re.compile(rb\"^HTTP/1\\.[01]\\s+(\\d{3})\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\nREQUEST_LINE_RE = re.compile(rb\"^([A-Z]+)\\s+([^\\s]+)\\s+HTTP/1\\.[01]\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _find_request_starts(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return byte offsets where HTTP requests start (method token).\"\"\"\r\n    starts = []\r\n    i = 0\r\n    while i < len(data):\r\n        for method in HTTP_METHODS:\r\n            m = method.encode()\r\n            if data[i : i + len(m)] == m and (i == 0 or data[i - 1 : i] in b\"\\r\\n\"):\r\n                starts.append(i)\r\n                break\r\n        i += 1\r\n    return starts\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _find_response_starts(data: bytes) -> list[tuple[int, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return list of (offset, status_code) for HTTP response starts.\"\"\"\r\n    results = []\r\n    for m in HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.finditer(data):\r\n        results.append((m.start(), int(m.group(1))))\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _header_value(data: bytes, name: str) -> str | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Get first header value (case-insensitive).\"\"\"\r\n    prefix = name.encode().lower() + b\":\"\r\n    start = data.lower().find(prefix)\r\n    if start == -1:\r\n        return None\r\n    end = data.find(b\"\\r\\n\", start)\r\n    if end == -1:\r\n        end = len(data)\r\n    line = data[start + len(prefix) : end].strip().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    return line\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _split_headers_body(data: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (headers_bytes, body_bytes) after first \\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n.\"\"\"\r\n    idx = data.find(b\"\\r\\n\\r\\n\")\r\n    if idx == -1:\r\n        return (data, b\"\")\r\n    return (data[:idx], data[idx + 4 :])\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _body_length_from_headers(headers: bytes) -> int | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Content-Length if present.\"\"\"\r\n    v = _header_value(headers, \"Content-Length\")\r\n    if v is None:\r\n        return None\r\n    try:\r\n        return int(v)\r\n    except ValueError:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_chunked(body: bytes) -> bytes:\r\n    \"\"\"Best-effort chunked decode; return concatenated body.\"\"\"\r\n    out = bytearray()\r\n    i = 0\r\n    while i < len(body):\r\n        line_end = body.find(b\"\\r\\n\", i)\r\n        if line_end == -1:\r\n            break\r\n        try:\r\n            size = int(body[i:line_end].strip().split(b\";\")[0], 16)\r\n        except ValueError:\r\n            break\r\n        i = line_end + 2\r\n        if size == 0:\r\n            break\r\n        if i + size <= len(body):\r\n            out.extend(body[i : i + size])\r\n        i += size\r\n        if body.find(b\"\\r\\n\", i) == i:\r\n            i += 2\r\n    return bytes(out)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_request(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse one request starting at start. Return (parsed_dict, start, end_offset) or None.\"\"\"\r\n    chunk = data[start:]\r\n    headers, body = _split_headers_body(chunk)\r\n    req_line = headers.split(b\"\\r\\n\")[0]\r\n    match = REQUEST_LINE_RE.match(req_line)\r\n    if not match:\r\n        return None\r\n    method = match.group(1).decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    path = match.group(2).decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    host = _header_value(headers, \"Host\")\r\n    cl = _body_length_from_headers(headers)\r\n    if cl is not None:\r\n        body_len = min(cl, len(body))\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4 + body_len\r\n    else:\r\n        te = _header_value(headers, \"Transfer-Encoding\")\r\n        if te and \"chunked\" in te.lower():\r\n            # consume chunked body best-effort\r\n            raw_body = body\r\n            body = _parse_chunked(raw_body)\r\n            end = start + len(headers) + 4 + len(raw_body)  # approximate\r\n        else:\r\n            end = start + len(headers) + 4\r\n    return ({\"method\": method, \"path\": path, \"host\": host, \"headers\": headers, \"body\": body, \"start\": start, \"end\": end}, start, end)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_response(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse one response. Return (parsed_dict, start, end_offset).\"\"\"\r\n    chunk = data[start:]\r\n    headers, body = _split_headers_body(chunk)\r\n    status_match = HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.match(headers.split(b\"\\r\\n\")[0] + b\" \")\r\n    if not status_match:\r\n        status_match = HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.search(headers)\r\n    if not status_match:\r\n        return None\r\n    status_code = int(status_match.group(1))\r\n    cl = _body_length_from_headers(headers)\r\n    if cl is not None:\r\n        body_len = min(cl, len(body))\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4 + body_len\r\n    else:\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4\r\n    return ({\"status_code\": status_code, \"headers\": headers, \"body\": body, \"start\": start, \"end\": end}, start, end)\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HTTP1Handler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/1.1 request/response pairs from plaintext reassembled streams.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"http1\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if not c2s_bytes and not s2c_bytes:\r\n            return False\r\n        data = c2s_bytes[:200] if c2s_bytes else s2c_bytes[:200]\r\n        if REQUEST_LINE_RE.match(data.lstrip()) or b\"HTTP/1.\" in data[:20]:\r\n            return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        req_starts = _find_request_starts(c2s_bytes)\r\n        resp_starts = _find_response_starts(s2c_bytes)\r\n        if not req_starts:\r\n            return []\r\n        req_idx = 0\r\n        resp_idx = 0\r\n        txn_index = 0\r\n        while req_idx < len(req_starts):\r\n            req_start = req_starts[req_idx]\r\n            result = _consume_request(c2s_bytes, req_start)\r\n            if not result:\r\n                req_idx += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            req_info, _r0, req_end = result\r\n            # Pair with next response (simple: next response start after previous response end)\r\n            resp_start_offset = 0\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                resp_start_offset, status_code = resp_starts[resp_idx]\r\n resp_end_offset = resp_end\r\n                else:\r\n                    resp_end_offset = resp_start_offset\r\n            else:\r\n                status_code = None\r\n                resp_end_offset = 0\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_start, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_start_offset, s2c_ts_map) if resp_idx < len(resp_starts) else None\r\n            end_ts = response_ts  # approximate\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts) and resp_result := _consume_response(s2c_bytes, resp_start_offset):\r\n                _, _, resp_end = resp_result\r\n                end_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_end, s2c_ts_map) or end_ts\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            request_bytes = req_end - req_start\r\n            response_bytes = resp_end_offset - resp_start_offset if resp_idx < len(resp_starts) else 0\r\n            if resp_result and resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                _, _, re = resp_result\r\n                response_bytes = re - resp_start_offset\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id, txn_index)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"http1\",\r\n                    method=req_info.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req_info.get(\"host\"),\r\n                    path=req_info.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=status_code,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n
